notes: Pairs z-score reversion. EA runs one instance per host symbol; each instance also reads its correlated partner leg (Strategy_PeerSymbol mapping: EURUSD<->GBPUSD, AUDUSD<->NZDUSD, SP500<->NDX, XAUUSD<->XAGUSD). Partner read is bound at call site via SymbolSelect + CopyClose(peer, M5, ...) for the spread/z computation. Both legs of each traded pair must be warmed/synced for the instance to compute a spread, hence both members of every pair are declared in basket_symbols to avoid SYMBOL_SCOPE_LEAK.
